summary: Iteration 46: Card Games overhaul feature testing. Tested all 15 features: Games tab in both navbars, CardGames hub (/games) with 4 game cards, individual game lobby navigation (Rummy/Poker/Teen Patti), Solitaire gameplay, and MatchCentre empty state. 14/15 features PASS. 1 feature (MatchCentre empty state) could not be live-tested due to live cricket matches being present, but code review confirms correct implementation.

integration_issues.flow: MatchCentre empty state Card Games CTA
integration_issues.issue: Cannot verify live - live/upcoming cricket matches are present in test environment. Code review confirms T20SeasonCountdown component at MatchCentre.js lines 44-71 has correct implementation with data-testid='empty-state-play-games-btn' and 4 game icon buttons (empty-state-game-rummy/teen-patti/poker/solitaire). Implementation is correct per code review.

issues: Game board is narrow (~560px) and left-aligned relative to center on very wide screens. On large monitors the board appears off-center. Minor UX - functionally fine on mobile/tablet which is the primary target.

critical_code_review_comments: App.js routing: /games/solitaire route is correctly defined BEFORE /games/:gameType to prevent conflict - good ordering
SolitairePage: Card selection renders rgb(255,253,231) background (#fffde7) and 2px gold border - works correctly
MatchCentre: T20SeasonCountdown component renders Card Games promo with all 4 game data-testids - correctly implemented, shows only when no matches
CardGames.js/GameLobby.js: All data-testid attributes present for testability
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card Games overhaul complete and working. All routes: /games (hub), /games/rummy, /games/poker, /games/teen_patti, /games/solitaire all verified. Mobile bottom nav has 5 items: Home/Play/Games/Missions/Profile. Solitaire uses coordinate-based clicking (stock pile at x=703, y=164 on 1920x1080; tableau col 0 face-up card at x=703, y=258). Card selection uses gold bg rgb(255,253,231) and border 2px solid rgb(198,160,82). MatchCentre empty state cannot be tested when live matches are present.
passed_tests: Games tab visible in desktop top navbar
Games tab visible in mobile bottom navbar (all 5 nav items: Home/Play/Games/Missions/Profile)
NEW badge visible on Games tab in mobile bottom nav
Card Games hub (/games) shows all 4 game cards: Rummy (HOT), Teen Patti (POPULAR), Poker, Solitaire (NEW)
Join private room with code button on hub page works - toggles join code input
Rummy lobby: Back to Games button, Quick Play, Create Room, Create Private Room, Join with code, Stats (Played/Won/Win%/Coins), Open Rooms - all present
Back button on Rummy lobby returns to /games hub
Poker card click navigates to /games/poker and loads correctly
Teen Patti card click navigates to /games/teen_patti and loads correctly
Solitaire: Undo button and New Game button exist
Solitaire: Stock pile is clickable and draws cards (moves 0→1 confirmed)
Solitaire: Face-up card click shows gold selection border (rgb(255,253,231) bg, 2px solid rgb(198,160,82) border)
Solitaire: New Game button resets game state (moves back to 0)
